name: Raytheon Company
description: RTX Corporation is a leading American aerospace and defense company headquartered in Arlington, Virginia. Formed in 2020 through the merger of Raytheon Company and United Technologies Corporation, it operates through three primary business segments: Collins Aerospace, Pratt & Whitney, and Raytheon. The company provides advanced technology and services to customers worldwide, specializing in the development and manufacturing of aircraft engines, avionics, aerostructures, cybersecurity solutions, guided missiles, air defense systems, satellites, and drones. RTX is a major contractor for the U.S. government and continues to be a prominent innovator in global aerospace and defense industries.
